items.title: Amazon Raises $15 Billion In Oversubscribed Bond Sale Amid Surging AI Cost
items.description: Amazon is returning to the bond market with a $15 billion sale as it ramps up AI spending, joins rivals Meta and Oracle in a major tech borrowing wave, and draws strong investor demand despite rising infrastructure costs.

items.title: Why US data centers are concentrated in the 'rodeo region'
items.description: Big Tech companies, like Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Oracle (ORCL), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) are betting on the central US, otherwise known as the "rodeo region." Bow River Capital vice chairman, economist, and chief strategy officer Rick Pederson joins Asking for a Trend to discuss why this region has become a key focus in the AI era. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

items.title: Amazon, Ford Partner on Used Cars. 4 Stocks That Could Be Impacted.
items.description: Amazon  com, with its penchant for disrupting retail industries, is going after the used car business with the help of  Ford Motor  That could be bad news for  CarGurus Cars.com CarMax  and  Carvana  though they weren’t really acting like it, for the most part.  Monday, Ford Motor and Amazon announced that car buyers can shop for certified preowned Ford vehicles on Amazon Autos.  Amazon launched its car buying platform in late 2024, partnering with  Hyundai Motor  Hertz was Amazon Autos’ first fleet customer.

items.title: Skip the dealership and buy a used Ford on Amazon: What to know
items.description: Amazon (AMZN) and Ford (F) are teaming up to offer certified used vehicles from dealerships through the e-commerce giant's new Amazon Autos site. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian outlines the details on Market Domination Overtime. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.
